component.name: GIF Editor
component.summary: Edit GIFs, videos, and images with layers, text, and animation

description.p: A desktop application for editing GIFs, MP4s, WebMs, and static images. Add image and text overlay layers with affine transforms (scale, skew), keyframe animation, and per-frame positioning. Delete and restore frames, export to GIF, MP4, or WebM with audio preservation.
